$comment: Layer D for TARIFF: static data-flow equivalence between the IR and migrated candidate A (OCCURS O2x). Both zone-code tables are one flow region of constants (the legacy X table and the modern String[] array - the array-region model is type-agnostic); C1..C3 derive from that region, F1..F3 and TOTAL from the weight input with the rate constants and half-up rounding, TIER is control flow over the total.
